title: oxalis stipulata
intro: Oxalis stipulata, also known as the Mexican sorrel or wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalis genus. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include its anthraquinone content, which has been shown to have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxalis stipulata include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its ability to stimulate bowel movements. Oxalis stipulata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and address various gastrointestinal issues.
